message:
br-bd-8bdla add CLI binary E2E smoke tests for `ffs mount`

Complements existing inspect/fsck/repair CLI coverage with three mount
smoke tests that do not require a live FUSE mount:
- cli_mount_help_advertises_runtime_modes_and_rw_toggles: freezes the
  surface of `ffs mount --help` (runtime modes, --rw, --native,
  --allow-other, --managed-unmount-timeout-secs).
- cli_mount_nonexistent_image_reports_error: proves the CLI rejects a
  missing image with a non-empty diagnostic and non-zero exit.
- cli_mount_managed_unmount_timeout_rejected_in_standard_mode: enforces
  the documented invalid combo of standard runtime + managed-unmount
  timeout, catching the regression before any FUSE init.

Each test emits SCENARIO_RESULT structured logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
